title: Atelier Steel
summary: An architect's night studio: three tones of charcoal, one bone-warm foil, one typeface (Geist). The chrome carries no chromatic information — the iframe is the only colour on screen.
darkAccent: bone-warm #D7CDB6 — active dock left bar + saving pill only
typeface: Geist (500 headline, 400 body) — one face does everything
railTreatment: five Geist monograms with italic/roman alternation for silhouette distinctness — Si roman · SM italic · Bp roman · Db italic · Lg roman
